description: Human-verifiable proof that aloop start no longer crashes with 'deps.discoverWorkspace is not a function' when Commander passes its Command object as the 3rd argument to the action handler

artifacts.description: aloop start CLI invocation exercises the resolveStartDeps fix path — Commander passes its Command object, resolveStartDeps detects it is not a StartDeps object and falls back to defaultDeps. The command reaches the expected 'Project prompts not found' error instead of crashing with 'deps.discoverWorkspace is not a function'.

before_fix.error: TypeError: deps.discoverWorkspace is not a function
before_fix.cause: Commander passes Command object as 3rd arg to .action(); startCommand treated it as StartDeps without validation

after_fix.output: Error: Project prompts not found: /home/pj/.aloop/projects/<hash>/prompts. Run `aloop setup` first.
after_fix.explanation: Command reaches normal config-not-found error path instead of crashing — resolveStartDeps correctly falls back to defaultDeps when given a Commander Command object

artifacts.description: aloop start --help renders full help text without crash — confirms Commander argument passing through resolveStartDeps works for all invocation paths
5 regression tests validate resolveStartDeps handles all Commander injection scenarios — valid deps passthrough, Commander Command object fallback, undefined/null/string fallback

test_results.name: resolveStartDeps returns valid StartDeps when provided
resolveStartDeps falls back to defaultDeps when given Commander Command object
resolveStartDeps falls back to defaultDeps for undefined
resolveStartDeps falls back to defaultDeps for null
resolveStartDeps falls back to defaultDeps for non-object

verdict: PASS — aloop start no longer crashes with Commander-injected args. resolveStartDeps (isStartDeps type guard + defaultDeps fallback) correctly handles Commander Command objects, undefined, null, and non-object values. CLI invocation reaches normal error paths instead of 'deps.discoverWorkspace is not a function' crash. 5 regression tests confirm all scenarios.
